---
title: "Using mbadtools"
output: html_notebook
---

# Packages

```{r}
if(!("devtools" %in% installed.packages())) install.packages("devtools")
```

```{r}
# install mbadtools from github
if(!("mbadtools" %in% installed.packages())) 
  pak::pak("bhartman2/mbadtools")
```


```{r}
library(mbadtools) # make package available to notebook
```

# Simple Test
```{r}
cars
f = lm(dist~speed, data=cars) 
f |> tidy(conf.int=TRUE) |> gt_add_significance() # tests broom
f |> gg_residual_plots() # tests plots
```
# Reprex?
```{r}
library(gglm)
f = lm(dist~speed, data=cars)
gglm(f)
```
